languages.text: "Столь мучительное чувство... что-то навевает мне болезненные, злые цвета — словно плеснуло ало-черным и испортило мой собственный холст. Должно быть, так чувствуют себя те, на кого влияю... я?" {n}Кассия выглядит скорее удивленной, чем разгневанной.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Столь мучительное чувство... что-то навевает мне болезненные, злые цвета — словно плеснуло ало-черным и испортило мой собственный холст. Должно быть, так чувствуют себя те, на кого влияю... я?" {n}Кассия выглядит скорее удивленной, чем разгневанной.{/n}
traits.speaker: CassiaCompanion

languages.text: "Such a tormenting sensation. Something is conjuring painful, angry hues within me, as if splashing crimson and black across my canvas and ruining it. Is this how those I influence feel..." {n}Cassia looks more surprised than angered.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Столь мучительное чувство... что-то навевает мне болезненные, злые цвета — словно плеснуло ало-черным и испортило мой собственный холст. Должно быть, так чувствуют себя те, на кого влияю... я?" {n}Кассия выглядит скорее удивленной, чем разгневанной.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Such a tormenting sensation. Something is conjuring painful, angry hues within me, as if sloshing crimson and black across my canvas and spoiling it. This must be how those I influence feel..." {n}Cassia looks more surprised than angered.{/n}

"Such a tormenting sensation. Something is conjuring painful, angry hues within me, as if splashing crimson and black across my canvas and ruining it. Is this how those I influence feel..." {n}Cassia looks more surprised than angered.{/n}

languages.text: «Es una sensación tortuosa. Algo conjura tonos dolorosos y furibundos en mi interior, salpicando mi lienzo de rojo y negro para estropearlo. ¿Se sienten así aquellos en quienes influyo...?». {n}Cassia parece más sorprendida que iracunda.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Such a tormenting sensation. Something is conjuring painful, angry hues within me, as if splashing crimson and black across my canvas and ruining it. Is this how those I influence feel..." {n}Cassia looks more surprised than angered.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Es una sensación tortuosa. Algo conjura tonos dolorosos y furibundos en mi interior, salpicando mi lienzo de rojo y negro para estropearlo. ¿Se sienten así aquellos en quienes influyo...?». {n}Cassia parece más sorprendida que iracunda.{/n}

languages.text: “何等折磨人的感受。有什么东西正在我体内唤起痛苦而愤怒的色彩，仿佛将猩红与墨黑泼溅上我的画布，将它毁得一塌糊涂。难道……那些受我影响的人，便是这般感受……”{n}卡西娅的神情，与其说是愤怒，倒不如说是惊愕。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Such a tormenting sensation. Something is conjuring painful, angry hues within me, as if splashing crimson and black across my canvas and ruining it. Is this how those I influence feel..." {n}Cassia looks more surprised than angered.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “何等折磨人的感受。有什么东西正在我体内唤起痛苦而愤怒的色彩，仿佛将猩红与墨黑泼溅上我的画布，将它毁得一塌糊涂。难道……那些受我影响的人，便是这般感受……”{n}卡西娅的神情，与其说是愤怒，倒不如说是惊愕。{/n}

languages.text: « Quelle sensation horrible... Quelque chose évoque des nuances colériques en moi, comme si des éclaboussures pourpres et noires souillaient ma toile. Je me demande si c'est là ce qu'éprouvent ceux que j'influence... » {n}Cassia semble plus surprise qu'en colère.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Such a tormenting sensation. Something is conjuring painful, angry hues within me, as if splashing crimson and black across my canvas and ruining it. Is this how those I influence feel..." {n}Cassia looks more surprised than angered.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Quelle sensation horrible... Quelque chose évoque des nuances colériques en moi, comme si des éclaboussures pourpres et noires souillaient ma toile. Je me demande si c'est là ce qu'éprouvent ceux que j'influence... » {n}Cassia semble plus surprise qu'en colère.{/n}

languages.text: "Ne eziyet verici bir his. İçimde acı verici, kızgın renkler canlanıyor... Sanki tuvalime kızıl ve siyah sıçratılıp onu mahvediyor gibi. Etkilediğim kişiler de böyle mi hissediyor?" {n}Cassia, kızmıştan çok şaşırmış gibi görünüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Such a tormenting sensation. Something is conjuring painful, angry hues within me, as if splashing crimson and black across my canvas and ruining it. Is this how those I influence feel..." {n}Cassia looks more surprised than angered.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ne eziyet verici bir his. İçimde acı verici, kızgın renkler canlanıyor... Sanki tuvalime kızıl ve siyah sıçratılıp onu mahvediyor gibi. Etkilediğim kişiler de böyle mi hissediyor?" {n}Cassia, kızmıştan çok şaşırmış gibi görünüyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Was für eine quälende Empfindung. Etwas weckt schmerzhaft wütende Farben in mir, als würden Rot und Schwarz meine Leinwand ruinieren. Fühlen sich so die Ziele meiner Beeinflussung ...?" {n}Cassia wirkt eher überrascht als wütend.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Such a tormenting sensation. Something is conjuring painful, angry hues within me, as if splashing crimson and black across my canvas and ruining it. Is this how those I influence feel..." {n}Cassia looks more surprised than angered.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Was für eine quälende Empfindung. Etwas weckt schmerzhaft wütende Farben in mir, als würden Rot und Schwarz meine Leinwand ruinieren. Fühlen sich so die Ziele meiner Beeinflussung ...? {n}Cassia wirkt eher überrascht als wütend.{/n}

languages.text: 「こんな苦痛な感覚。何か、私のキャンバスに赤と黒をぶちまけて台無しにするように、苦痛と怒りの色を呼び起こしている。私が影響を与えている人たちはこのような気持ちなのだろうか…」{n}カシアは怒りよりも驚いた表情をしている。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Such a tormenting sensation. Something is conjuring painful, angry hues within me, as if splashing crimson and black across my canvas and ruining it. Is this how those I influence feel..." {n}Cassia looks more surprised than angered.{/n}
